pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java compiler source and target properties to version 17 to align with the migration goal.
Add Jakarta XML Binding (JAXB) dependencies to replace the module removed from the JDK in Java 11.
Add Jakarta Persistence API dependencies to replace the javax.persistence module removed from the JDK.
Add Jersey 3.x dependencies which implement the Jakarta EE 9+ JAX-RS specification (jakarta namespace).
Add Jakarta Expression Language dependency required by Jakarta EE 9+ specifications.
Replace JUnit 4 with JUnit 5 (Jupiter) BOM and add Mockito integration for modern testing.
Add Hibernate Core dependency for ORM capabilities.
Add JDBC drivers for H2, PostgreSQL, and MySQL.
Upgrade Lombok to a newer version compatible with recent Java versions.
Add Eclipse Collections library for enhanced collection utilities.
Add Arquillian BOM for integration testing support.
Add Hamcrest matchers for testing assertions.
Add JJWT library for JSON Web Token handling.
Reformat the project root element to a single line for cleaner XML structure.

.dockerignore.general_idea: The .github directory is removed from the .dockerignore file, likely to allow CI configuration or scripts to be included in the Docker build context for the new Java 17 environment.

.github/ci-settings.xml.general_idea: Change the SonarQube server URL from a public university instance to a local development machine address.

.github/workflows/ci.yml.general_idea: Remove explicit JDK 8 setup step as the build now relies on a Docker container for the Java environment.
Remove Maven dependency caching step, likely due to switching to a self-contained Docker build or performance issues with self-hosted runners.
Change the build command to use a shell script (`./mvn.sh`) that presumably invokes Maven inside a Docker container.
Add Microsoft Teams notifications for build success and failure using a specific GitHub Action.
Remove or comment out previous attempts at Microsoft Teams notifications using different actions.
Correct the Maven site deployment command syntax in the CI workflow.
.github/workflows/ci.yml.human_impl: Changed `run: ./mvn.sh site:site site:deploy` to `run: ./mvn.sh site:site site-deploy`.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the Maven build stage base image to a custom repository to ensure compatibility or availability.
Remove environment variable definitions for Bintray credentials that are no longer used.
Dockerfile.human_impl: Removed ARG BINTRAY_USERNAME, ENV BINTRAY_USERNAME, ARG BINTRAY_API_KEY, ENV BINTRAY_API_KEY

Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the path to the Maven settings file to reflect a new directory structure.

build/build.sh.general_idea: Removes build arguments for Bintray credentials as the artifact repository is being migrated away from Bintray.
Adds a build argument to pass the SonarQube token into the Docker build for code quality analysis.
Documents the required environment variables for the build script to function correctly.
build/build.sh.human_impl: ## MAKE SURE YOU HAVE enviroment variables ...

mvn.sh.general_idea: Switch the Docker container image from an OpenJ9 JDK 11 variant to an AdoptOpenJDK 16 variant to align with the target JDK version.
Replace short-form Docker CLI flags with their long-form equivalents for better readability and standard compliance.
Mount the local SSH directory into the container to enable secure Git operations or artifact publishing.
Mount the local Git configuration into the container to preserve user-specific Git settings.
Replace the direct user ID mapping with PUID/PGID environment variables and use runuser to execute Maven as a non-root user within the container.
mvn.sh.human_impl: --env PUID=`id -u` -e PGID=`id -g` ... runuser --user user --group user -- mvn
